issues.detail: The skill file only covers happy path scenarios and does not address error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Scatter trees on terrain with slope-based density in a Point Wrangle (VEX)
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the documented VEX pattern (dot(@N, {0,1,0}) for slope, removepoint(0, @ptnum), f@pscale, i@tree_type, fit01/rand); baseline gave a generic 'use a scatter SOP' answer without the VEX point-wrangle attribute writes.

scenarios.name: Batch-export 1000 game asset LODs from heightmaps using PDG/TOPs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chained File Pattern -> HDA Processor (mesh, scatter, LOD) -> ROP Geometry -> CSV Output with HQueue/Deadline scheduling as documented; baseline described generic Python loops without the TOP node chain.
